retry_reason: Failure means the namespace does not exist; retrying with the same name will not create it, so retry is pointless.
contract_summary: RCU-protected lookup-and-get: performs an atomic lookup of a namespace by name (via __aa_lookupn_ns) under RCU read lock, and if found, increments its reference count with aa_get_ns. Returns a pointer to the namespace with an elevated refcount, or NULL if not found. The caller must release the reference with aa_put_ns when done. The caller does not need to hold any locks; the RCU lock is managed internally. This is a read-only acquisition, not a creation.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to look up a namespace and acquire a reference count on it via aa_get_ns. The function consists solely of RCU locking, a lookup call, a get call, and unlock, with no other logic.

check.reason: The callee aa_get_ns increments refcount on the returned ns, which flows out of aa_lookupn_ns via the return. The access path ns.unconfined.label.count.count.refcount and type chain match the callee's description.
